subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One calleth out and saith: O people! Fear ye God, and deny not His signs and His proof [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان المظلوم ینادی و یقول یا قوم اتقوا الله و لاتکفروا بایات الله و برهانه انه
subcodes.subjects: @belief and denial, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action
